seoTitle: West Lamington vs West Leederville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Lamington and West Leederville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Lamington vs West Leederville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Lamington and West Leederville.
heading: West Lamington vs West Leederville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Lamington, Western Australia and West Leederville, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Leederville has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to West Lamington (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Lamington or West Leederville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Lamington has a flood risk score of 37/100, while West Leederville scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Lamington scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. West Leederville scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Lamington or West Leederville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Leederville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
